capabilities.name: Search
capabilities.verify: Stage-3 live 2026-07-06: search_kb over the MCP REST gateway on rzhj returned ranked published articles (first run caught+fixed a schema bug — the action queried kb_articles.answer; columns are answer_text/answer_json, fixed in 4c9b9ad0, agent-execute redeployed, re-run green). Public search in src/pages/KnowledgeBasePage.tsx.
capabilities.notes: search_kb skill (module:kb, action=search) matches title/question/answer_text server-side — published-only by default, featured-then-views ranking. Public UI search remains client-side substring (server FTS is the remaining depth item).

capabilities.name: Public help center
capabilities.verify: publish/unpublish actions on manage_kb_article; public /kb portal (src/pages/KnowledgeBasePage.tsx) + admin publish controls

capabilities.name: Article feedback/rating
capabilities.notes: Skill/admin surface missing — no feedback skill or admin feedback analytics.

capabilities.name: Article versioning
capabilities.verify: no version history table, skill, or UI for kb_articles

capabilities.name: KB-powered ticket auto-resolve
capabilities.verify: no auto-resolve skill in kb or tickets module
capabilities.notes: include_in_chat grounds chat answers in KB, but no ticket auto-resolve flow exists.

capabilities.name: KB articles embedded in FlowPilot chat context
capabilities.verify: include_in_chat param on manage_kb_article; toggle in admin KB editor
capabilities.notes: Added: clearly shown in kb-module skill instructions.
